positive: A highly stylized, intricate bioluminescent forest scene. Focus on large, sweeping silhouettes of exotic flora and mystical, curling root systems. The composition should be perfectly circular or central, allowing for garment printing. Use deep indigo and teal as the primary background colors, contrasted sharply with electric neon cyan, lime green, and magenta bioluminescent accents. The style should be hyper-detailed graphic illustration, combining elements of Art Nouveau engraving with modern psychedelic vaporwave aesthetic. Strong depth, high contrast, no gradients, perfect clean lines, cinematic spotlighting, 8k, high resolution.
